DULE = True\",\"old\":\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None and TRAIN_MAX_STEPS > 0:\\n        total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS\\n    else:\\n        total_steps = max(steps_per_epoch * 20, 1)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Enable a cosine schedule and tie its horizon to the actual fixed-step budget so the learning rate decays over the full verifier run instead of staying almost constant.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\"]}"}}
